title: Amtech S0702 2 Piece Tie down strap set (250cm)
features: DURABLE: These 450cm x 25mm tie down straps are made from tough polypropylene webbing for securing loads of up to 150kg
EASY TO USE: They have handy tie down straps with metal cam buckles for ease of use
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 2pc TIE DOWN STRAPS (2.5m x 25mm) See more
